mission.title: lima: Remove indirect dependency on github.com/mailru/easyjson
mission.description: Remove indirect dependency on github.com/mailru/easyjson. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current lima setup
steps.description:
Verify your lima version and configuration:
```bash
limactl --version
```
This feature requires a working lima installation.

steps.title: Review lima configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant lima configuration:
### Description

This project has an indirect dependency on [github.com/mailru/easyjson](https://github.com/lima-vm/lima/blob/ad8ac1cbc58b3fe3fb2078409d2f649eb0e9cf51/go.mod#L102), a Go library with maintainers based in Russia and affiliated with VK

steps.title: Apply the fix for Remove indirect dependency on github.com/mailru/easyjson
steps.description:
Bumps [github.com/invopop/jsonschema](https://github.com/invopop/jsonschema) from 0.13.0 to 0.14.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/invopop/jsonschema's releases.

v0.14.0

What's Changed

  • Upgrade to golangci-lint v2 by @​samlown in

steps.title: Upgrade lima to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade lima:
```bash
# Check current version
limactl --version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/lima-vm/lima
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Remove indirect dependency on github.com/mailru/easyjson" is functioning correctly.

prerequisites.description: A working lima installation or development environment.
